Video.summary: Specializing in muscle, classic and late model exotics, Vicari Auctions offer vehicles up for bid.
Video.title: Cars Up for Sale Include a Beautiful 1954 Roadmaster and a Rare Buick Gsx Muscle Car.

Image.alt: Cars Up for Sale Include a Beautiful 1954 Roadmaster and a Rare Buick Gsx Muscle Car.
Cars Up for Sale Include a Beautiful 1954 Roadmaster and a Rare Buick Gsx Muscle Car.
Cars Up for Sale Include a Beautiful 1954 Roadmaster and a Rare Buick Gsx Muscle Car.

Video.summary: Vicari Auctions have grown to offer over 600 vehicles up for bid with no reserve.
Video.title: Bidders Compete for a 1976 Chevrolet Disguised as a Rolls Royce, a Vintage Porsche and a Couple of Ready-To-Race Collector Cars.

Image.alt: Bidders Compete for a 1976 Chevrolet Disguised as a Rolls Royce, a Vintage Porsche and a Couple of Ready-To-Race Collector Cars.
